name: grubhub-pp-mcp
description: Every Grubhub restaurant search, plus a sortable delivery-fee comparison board, a cross-restaurant deal radar, and offline menu-item search no Grubhub tool has.

grubhub_token.title: GRUBHUB_TOKEN
grubhub_token.description: Optional. Grubhub needs no user token: the CLI mints an anonymous bearer automatically. Set this only to pin a specific token.
